caption: In an indoor basketball gymnasium with blue walls and blue tiered seating, a man wearing a pink tank top and black shorts interacts with a basketball. He begins by jumping high into the air, holding a basketball aloft as if attempting a shot or dunk. After landing, he is seen walking across the polished wooden court toward the right side of the frame. He then turns back toward the left, dribbling the ball on the court. Finally, the man moves close to the camera, filling a large portion of the frame as he looks directly forward. The gymnasium contains multiple basketball hoops with white backboards and orange rims. The court is marked with yellow lines and features green circular sections. No on-screen text or logos are visible throughout the sequence.
